ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Primary position of the player on the court */,
  "roster_position" TEXT /* Roster position of the player */,
  "salary" INTEGER /* Salary of the player */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team the player belongs to */,
  "avg_points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored by the player per game */,
  "player_height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "player_weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player */,
  "player_dob" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "player_nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "player_draft_year" INTEGER /* Year the player was drafted */,
  "player_draft_round" TEXT /* Draft round */,
  "player_draft_pick" INTEGER /* Draft pick number */,
  "player_college" TEXT /* College the player attended */,
  "player_experience" INTEGER /* Number of years of professional experience */,
  "player_injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status */,
  "player_contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's current contract */,
  "player_contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's current contract */,
  "player_contract_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the player's contract */,
  "player_agent" TEXT /* Name of the player's agent */,
  "player_twitter_handle" TEXT /* Player's Twitter handle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_abbreviation FOREIGN KEY ("team_abbreviation") REFERENCES teams ("team_abbreviation")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "game_info" TEXT /* Information about the game, including teams and time */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date of the game */,
  "game_time" TEXT /* Time of the game */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the away team */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the game is played */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "game_referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee officiating the game */,
  "game_attendance" INTEGER /* Attendance for the game */,
  "game_tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  "game_final_score_home" INTEGER /* Final score of the home team */,
  "game_final_score_away" INTEGER /* Final score of the away team */,
  "game_quarter_scores" TEXT /* Scores for each quarter */,
  "game_highlights_url" TEXT /* URL to game highlights */,
  "game_status" TEXT /* Status of the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_abbreviation"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_abbreviation")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Full name of the team */,
  "team_abbreviation" TEXT /* Abbreviation of the team */,
  "team_founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "team_location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "team_arena" TEXT /* Name of the team's home arena */,
  "team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the team's head coach */,
  "team_assistant_coaches" TEXT /* Names of the team's assistant coaches */,
  "team_general_manager" TEXT /* Name of the team's general manager */,
  "team_owner" TEXT /* Name of the team's owner */,
  "team_website" TEXT /* URL to the team's official website */,
  "team_social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles of the team */,
  "team_record" TEXT /* Current season record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, analyst, manager) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the user is associated with */,
  "user_email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "user_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "user_hire_date" TEXT /* Date the user was hired */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "user_access_level" INTEGER /* Access level of the user */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "user_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the user */,
  "user_photo_url" TEXT /* URL to the user's profile photo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_roles_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
column_names: Primary position of the player on the court
Abbreviation of the team the player belongs to
Average points scored by the player per game
Date of birth of the player
Number of years of professional experience
Start date of the player's current contract
End date of the player's current contract
